events.title: Suspension upgrade at Overland Cruisers, Belgrade, MT
events.thought: Dobinson MRR shocks and coils installed. The ride feels tighter, more planted, and ready for industrial-level gravel consumption.
events.photoCaption: New Dobinson MRR shocks and coils installed at Overland Cruisers.
